title: FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources for unpaid relative caregivers. Resources include information about available services, assistance in accessing these services, individual counseling, support groups, and caregiver training. Respite care and supplemental services are available on a limited basis. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: -Adult family members or other informal caregivers providing care to individuals 60 years of age and older -Adult family members or other informal caregivers providing care to individuals of any age with Alzheimer’s disease and related disorders -Older relatives (not parents) age 55 and older, providing care to children under the age of 18 -Older relatives, including parents, age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 721-6760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-6760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, or visit website for more information. Support group information is available by phone or online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Farsi, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Inner southeast Portland from the Willamette River to 82nd Avenue and from Burnside Street to the Clackamas County line (Multnomah County part of zip codes 97202, 97206, 97214, and 97215) SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Caregiver Counseling Caregiver Training * Kinship Caregivers Caregiver/Care Receiver Support Groups Family Caregiver Subsidies Respite Care Subsidies Specialized Information and Referral * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INFORMATION SERVICES - IMPACT KINCARE TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER
